texto: Mate after mate we find ourselves trying to adapt to who they want us to be till eventually we lose our true identity. We spend countless years learning each mate but never take the time to learn ourselves. In the end we know our mates better than we know ourselves. If and when the mate walks away we are stuck living with a stranger, ourselves. If u can't find comfort in urself how can anyone else find comfort in u?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Al-Saadiq Banks que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Mate after mate we find ourselves trying to adapt to who they want us to be till eventually we lo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, wisdom-quote, ourselves, com foco em termino e reflexao.
